name: reviewseed-mcp-app
description: ReviewSeed MCP App — search PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, and ERIC; explore MeSH/ERIC vocabulary with synonyms and hierarchy; assemble Boolean or ten-framework (PICO, PECO, SPIDER, PCC, ...) search strings

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && mkdir -p dist/server/assets && cp server/assets/eric-thesaurus-2025.json dist/server/assets/eric-thesaurus-2025.json && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build
scripts.dev: concurrently --raw "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build --watch" "tsx watch main.ts"
